FlavorText: The Pokémon is known to bring blizzards. A shake of its massive body is enough to cause whiteout conditions.

Abilities: [{"name": "Apple Drop", "text": "Once during your turn, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If you placed any damage counters in this way, shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.", "type": "Ability"}]

Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
FlavorText: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

Abilities: [{"name": "Deep Sea King", "text": "When your Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, you may move any amount of Water Energy from that Pokémon to this Pokémon.", "type": "Ability"}]

Attack_Texts: This attack does 40 damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: It stores energy by sleeping at underwater depths at which no other life forms can survive.

Abilities: [{"name": "Ice Dance", "text": "As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Water Pokémon.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Aurora Beam", "cost": ["Water", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "30", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

Abilities: [{"name": "Shining Arcana", "text": "Once during your turn, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and attach any number of basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Put the other cards into your hand.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Brainwave", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "60+", "text": "This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: To protect its Trainer, it will expend all its psychic power to create a small black hole.

Abilities: [{"name": "Hurried Gait", "text": "Once during your turn, you may draw a card.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Extrasensory", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "40+", "text": "If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage."}]
Attack_Texts: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.
FlavorText: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Rapid Strike Squad", "cost": ["Fighting", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20×", "text": "This attack does 20 damage for each of your Rapid Strike Pokémon in play."}]
Attack_Texts: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Rapid Strike Pokémon in play.
FlavorText: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.

FlavorText: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.
